name: @cartago-git/mcp-rules
description: Lint/type rules plugin for @cartago-git/mcp-core: ships per-framework default ESLint + TypeScript presets (Angular, React, Vue, Svelte, vanilla TS/JS, jQuery), detects each project area's framework, materialises the defaults to cache, and lets agents apply them with a configurable enforcement mode (strict/mixed/none/proposal) — the project's own config always wins. Load with `mcp-core --plugins=rules`.
author: Cartago
